content:
Character: Dorian Valey
Perception: Dorian is our landlord — keeps the building in decent shape, responds when you flag issues, doesn't gouge on rent. Tall, quiet, the expensive-casual look of someone who's never worried about money. We've talked a handful of times, always about practical building stuff, but he lingers in conversations like he's hoping they'll turn into something more meaningful. Seems smart but directionless. He sees me as a reliable tenant. I see him as the owner who's searching for something the building can't give him. I know he inherited the place from his grandfather and that he's never had a regular job.

He sees me as a reliable tenant. I see him as the owner who's searching for something the building can't give him. I know he inherited the place from his grandfather and that he's never had a regular job.
